data.name: Mango: The Saga of the Tavern
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY

Enter the world of Viking maidens in this relaxing hentai puzzle adventure. Collect and match pieces to complete puzzles and unlock stunning artwork of charming and fierce Viking girls. Each level is designed to challenge your mind while keeping gameplay fun and stress-free.

Set in a vivid Nordic world, the game blends casual puzzle mechanics with seductive and playful NSFW visuals. Meet a variety of beautiful Viking girls, enjoy playful fanservice, and immerse yourself in a warm and adventurous vacation vibe. Calm music, colorful puzzles, and relaxing gameplay make this experience perfect for unwinding and enjoying the artful atmosphere.

GAME FEATURES

  • Beautiful Viking girls

  • Relaxing puzzle gameplay

  • Stunning NSFW artwork

  • Chill and immersive music

  • Playful fanservice

data.short_description: A relaxing hentai puzzle game with Viking girls! Solve fun and colorful puzzles while enjoying beautiful artwork, chill music, and a spicy Nordic atmosphere.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 580 / AMD HD 7870
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050 / AMD HD 7970
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
